common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Retrieve key metrics for Open and Targeted campaigns

request_params.description:
Period Type. Applicable values:
Day
Week
Month
Last7d
Last30d

Note: The start date and end date must align with the Period Type.
request_params.name: period_type

request_params.description:
The start_date must be:

- Any day in the past three calendar months for "Day" period type

- Sunday for "Week" period type

- The 1st day of a Month for "Month" period type

- The date that is 6 days prior to the latest data date for "Last7d" period type

- The date that is 29 days prior to the latest data date for "Last30d" period type


Note: The latest data date can be obtained by using "AmsMarker" in the v2.ams.get_performance_data_update_time API.
request_params.name: start_date

request_params.description:
The end_date must be: 

- Equal to start_date for "Day" period type

- Saturday for "Week" period type

- The last day of a Month for "Month" period type. If the selected month is the current month, the end_date should be the latest data date

- The latest data date for "Last7d" period type

- The latest data date for "Last30d" period type


Note: 

- The end_date must be later than the start_date and earlier than the latest data date

- The latest data date can be obtained by using "AmsMarker" in the v2.ams.get_performance_data_update_time API.
request_params.name: end_date

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/ams/get_campaign_key_metrics_performance?access_token=access_token&end_date=20250831&partner_id=partner_id&period_type=Last30d&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&start_date=20250801&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
